summary: Completed backend API testing for BIBI Cars CRM KPI modules (KPI, Coaching, Predictive Lead Scoring, Call Flow Management). All 11 endpoints tested successfully with 100% pass rate.
passed_tests: System Health Check - Returns healthy status with version 3.1.0
Admin Login - Successfully authenticates with admin@crm.com/admin123, returns master_admin role
KPI Dashboard - Returns owner dashboard with totals, leaderboard, needsAttention, teamLeads
KPI Me - Returns current user KPI data (owner dashboard for master_admin)
KPI Leaderboard - Returns empty leaderboard (expected for new system)
KPI Alerts - Returns alerts data with needsAttention array and criticalCount
Coaching Me - Returns 'Coaching is for managers only' message (correct role restriction)
Predictive Leads Hot - Returns empty hot leads list (expected for new system)
Predictive Leads Top - Returns empty top leads list (expected for new system)
Call Flow Session Creation - Successfully creates session with proper ID and data structure
Call Flow Board - Returns 'Call board is for managers only' message (correct role restriction)
